highlights_headline: Performance-critical colour and interop paths are ported to managed code, and WASM exception handling is updated.

bullets.detail: Restored SK_ENABLE_LEGACY_SHADERCONTEXT to resolve a CPU raster regression introduced after the m151 engine sync.
emsdk 5.0.6 libraries are now built with the new exnref exception-handling model required by recent .NET WASM targets.
